[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000101000 2
1 0010010100 3
2 0110010010 4
3 1011011000 5
4 0000000000 a
5 0001011000 3
6 0000010100 2
7 0000001010 2
